recommendations.title: Two Lovers
recommendations.overview: A depressed man moves back in with his parents following a recent heartbreak and finds himself with two women.

recommendations.title: We Own the Night
recommendations.overview: A New York nightclub manager tries to save his brother and father from Russian mafia hitmen.

recommendations.title: Armageddon Time
recommendations.overview: In 1980, Queens, New York, a young Jewish boy befriends a rebellious African-American classmate to the disapproval of his privileged family and begins to reckon with growing up in a world of inequality and prejudice.

recommendations.title: The Immigrant
recommendations.overview: 1921 New York. An immigrant woman is tricked into a life of burlesque and vaudeville until a dazzling magician tries to save her and reunite her with her sister who is being held in the confines of Ellis Island.

recommendations.title: The Lost City of Z
recommendations.overview: A true-life drama in the 1920s, centering on British explorer Col. Percy Fawcett, who discovered evidence of a previously unknown, advanced civilization in the Amazon and disappeared whilst searching for it.

recommendations.title: Little Odessa
recommendations.overview: Long separated from his family, hitman Joshua returns to Brighton Beach for a contract killing for the Russian Mafia. His abusive father, Arkady, banned him from returning after Joshua committed his first murder. He takes up residence in a hotel, and

recommendations.title: Nine Queens
recommendations.overview: Two con artists try to swindle a stamp collector by selling him a sheet of counterfeit rare stamps, the "nine queens".

recommendations.title: The Vow
recommendations.overview: Happy young married couple Paige and Leo are, well, happy. Then a car accident puts Paige into a life-threatening coma. Upon awakening she has lost the previous five years of memories, including those of her beloved Leo, her wedding, a confusing rela

recommendations.title: Ad Astra
recommendations.overview: The near future, a time when both hope and hardships drive humanity to look to the stars and beyond. While a mysterious phenomenon menaces to destroy life on planet Earth, astronaut Roy McBride undertakes a mission across the immensity of space and i

recommendations.title: Serpico
recommendations.overview: New York cop Frank Serpico blows the whistle on the rampant corruption in the force only to have his comrades turn against him.
